title: Zzoyn Markers
description: Adds a clean 3D marker system that displays distance in the world. Perfect for teamwork and PvP.
body:
![marker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff33c36f31576d97d9871343516902120961ae2c.png)

![MC](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.20.1-7BB241) 
![MC](https://img.shields.io/badge/Platform-Forge-FF3B30)


# **Zzoyn Markers**
### Clean 3D world-space markers for perfect teamwork

**Zzoyn Markers** adds a **minimal and precise 3D marker system**, rendered directly **in the world** — not on the HUD.  
Place a marker with a keypress, and your teammates instantly see a floating distance label exactly where you pointed.

Smooth, readable and tactical — perfect for PvP and squad-based gameplay.

---

## **Features**
- **3D world marker** at the exact targeted location  
- **Visible through blocks** (just like tactical pings in shooters)
- **Smooth fade-in / fade-out animation**
- **Randomized marker colors** for easier visual distinction  
- Automatic **distance display**
- Marker distance **automatically scales with your render distance  
  → Max ping range = *your render distance in blocks × 16 + 50***
- Fully **team-based** marker sharing
- Lightweight, clean and performance-friendly  

---

## **Commands**
Built-in team system so your markers stay private unless you choose to share them.

### **/madd \<player\>**
Adds the player to your marker team.  
They will see all markers you create.

### **/mkick \<player\>**
Removes the player from your marker team.  
They will no longer receive your markers.

### **/mleave**
You leave your own marker team.  
Others will no longer see your markers until you form a new team.

---

## **Perfect for**
- Tactical PvP  
- Squad-based gameplay  
- Military / mil-sim servers  
- RP missions and scenarios  
- Exploration with friends  
- Any situation where you need a clean “ping” without clutter  

---

### **Why this mod?**
Unlike minimap waypoints or HUD icons, **Zzoyn Markers** places information *directly into the world*, making communication fast and intuitive — exactly how modern tactical games do it.

Clean. Precise. Zero noise.
